burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate to high due to heart failure and arrhythmias

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography showing LV dilation and reduced EF; exclude ischemic and secondary causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; limited access to devices and transplant

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo in cardiology centers; MRI limited to tertiary hospitals
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Guideline-directed HF therapy, ICD/CRT for selected patients, transplant in advanced cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to advanced devices and transplant programs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing cardiology networks and access to essential HF medications
